title: Anisophyllum lasiocarpum
taxonomy: Anisophyllum lasiocarpum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It belongs to the genus Anisophyllum, which is a group of plants commonly found in tropical regions. The family Celastraceae comprises over 1000 species of flowering plants, many of which are native to Asia and the Pacific Islands. Anisophyllum lasiocarpum is a unique species within this family, characterized by its distinctive leaves and fruit. Further classification of Anisophyllum lasiocarpum may involve its placement within a specific tribe or section within the Celastraceae family.
